title: Import Standard Library Packages
instruction: Import strings and fmt. Use strings.ToUpper("hello") and print it, then print len("hello").

title: Multiple Imports — fmt and math
instruction: Use fmt and math. Print math.Pi to 2 decimal places and math.Sqrt(16).

title: Package-Level Variables
instruction: A package-level variable greeting is set to "initialized". Print it from main.

title: math/rand — Random Numbers
instruction: Use rand.Intn(100)+1 to get a number 1-100 and print it.
